title: Visible Lattice
description: Consider a N × N × N lattice. One corner is at (0,0,0) and the opposite one is at (N, N, N). How many lattice points are visible from corner at (0,0,0)? A point X is visible from point Y iff no other lattice point lies on the segment joining X and Y.
input: The first line contains the number of test cases T. The next T lines contain an interger N.
output: Output T lines, one corresponding to each test case.
source: ICPC, Regionals, Asia West Continent, India, The 2009 ACM-ICPC Asia Amritapuri Regional Contest
